title: Simple Join Leave Messages
description: A mc plugin that changes the join/leave messages. ( I suck at making logos, sorry. )
body:
leave Simple Join messages is a plugin that changes the join and leave messages of the server, for when you or your friends or even your players join.

# But why should you choose this plugin over others?

- Simple
- No unneeded or extra features.
- Is lightweight and always will be light weight.
- Don't trust this plugin? It is 100% free and open source @ [https://github.com/evokerking1/SimpleJoinLeaveMessages](https://github.com/evokerking1/SimpleJoinLeaveMessages)
- Will always be free.
- Will never have paid features. (Having paid features goes aginst my common sense)

# Goals
- Make it extremely customizable

# Want to help make this better?

You may help me with this project by contributing to this project [here](https://github.com/evokerking1/SimpleJoinLeaveMessages)


I havent forgotten about this project but i have been busy with a new project!

MEET RitualsEngine which will make it easy to make rituals which takes x amount of items and makes one new item, perfect for smp's with a magic theme

# Thank you guys so much for 100 downloads!! Update coming soon, hopefully with velocity support and bstats analytics data!!
